text: Max loves reading. Every weekend he goes to his favorite bookstore. They always remember him. He picks out his favorite books. He reads them everywhere. Sometimes he sleeps among them. He forgets time. His mom says he loses imagination. They don't know about a letter. He reads it whenever sleepy. It inspires him. One day he writes books.
